meta.content: Detrics - Data Pipeline Automation for PPC Agencies

link.script: { "@context": "https://schema.org/", "@type": "WebSite", "name": "Detrics - Data Pipeline Automation for PPC Agencies", "url": "https://detrics.io" }

{ "@context": "https://schema.org", "@type": "Organization", "name": "Detrics", "url": "https://detrics.io", "logo": "https://detrics.io/images/detrics-round-logo.png", "description": "Data pipeline automation for PPC agencies.
